revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[User:Immanuelle/sandbox]] to [[Template:Asama Faith]]

revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Asama Faith | title = [[Sengen shrine|Asama Faith]] | listclass = hlist | image = [[File:Fuji Sankei Mandara from Fujisan Hongu Sengen Taisha.png|150px|link=|alt=]] |group1 = Main Deities |list1 = * [[Konohanasakuya-hime]]
|group2 = Shrines |list2 = * [[Fujisan Hongū Sengen Taisha]] * [[Ichinomiya Asama Shrine (Fuefuki)]] * [[Ichinomiya Sengen Shrine]] * [[Shizuoka Sengen Shrine]] * [[Yamamiya Sengen Shrine]] |group3 = Branch shrines |list3=
}}<noinclude>
[[Category:Shinto templates]] [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] [[Category:Akiha shrines]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: added [[Category:Akiha faith]] using [[WP:HC|HotCat]]

=== G ===

}}<noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
Bot: unused template redirect
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{subst:PAGENAME}" to "{{subst:PAGENAME}}"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Akiha Faith]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "↵[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]" to " <noinclude>[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Akiha Faith]] <noinclude>[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]
